ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the trip */,
  "start_station" TEXT /* Name of the starting station */,
  "start_terminal" INTEGER /* Terminal ID of the starting station */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the trip */,
  "end_station" TEXT /* Name of the ending station */,
  "end_terminal" INTEGER /* Terminal ID of the ending station */,
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the bike used in the trip */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Subscriber, Casual) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Promotional code used during the trip */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station FOREIGN KEY ("end_station") REFERENCES stations ("station_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_number FOREIGN KEY ("bike_number") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station FOREIGN KEY ("start_station") REFERENCES stations ("station_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Terminal ID of the station */,
  "total_bikes" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes at the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station in terms of bike slots */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., Active, Maintenance, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Repair) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance check */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "last_known_status" TEXT /* Last known status of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who holds the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Subscriber, Casual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription auto-renews */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the subscription */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied during the subscription purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the bike that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance check */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Details of the services performed */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_number FOREIGN KEY ("bike_number") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., trip start, trip end) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Mobile, Desktop) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "trips_started" INTEGER /* Number of trips started from this station on the given date */,
  "trips_ended" INTEGER /* Number of trips ended at this station on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips starting from or ending at the station */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled in trips starting from or ending at the station */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of usage for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_usage_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Code used to apply the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "redeemed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotion has been redeemed */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount amount given through the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)
